failed_join: both Q_to_T and B_L_to_S under exact primitive definitions
q_to_t_verdict: Q and Q^2 are residue-independent phase shifts; Weil T is residue-quadratic.
bl_to_s_verdict: B/L are deterministic state-local maps; Weil S is a dense finite Fourier kernel requiring a dual pairing not present in the native primitive definition.
chi12_chi8_multiplier_reproduction: The explicit Weil S/T matrices reproduce the previously used multiplier surfaces, but the native primitives do not generate those matrices without adding a dual-seating kernel.
next_target: Phase 6: Boundary map: determine whether Fourier kernel is generated by an earned projection/eigenbasis/accumulation layer, or remains external transform structure.
